config.Enable_BobberBarFishIcon.name: Enable: Bobber Bar Fish Icon
config.Enable_BobberBarFishIcon.desc: Replace the fish icon in the minigame with the real fish icon.
config.UncaughtFishSilhouette.name: - Show Silhouette for Uncaught Fish
config.UncaughtFishSilhouette.desc: If you haven't caught the fish before, the fish will be shown as silhouette.
config.RequireSonarBobber.name: - Require Sonar Bobber
config.RequireSonarBobber.desc: If you are not using the sonar bobber, the fish will be shown as silhouette.
config.Enable_GuarenteedSpecificBait.des: Make the targeted bait always get the targeted fish if the season and conditions match, while ignoring weather, time.
config.BypassCatchLimit.name: - Bypass Catch Limit
config.BypassCatchLimit.desc: Targeted bait will ignore catch limits, allowing fishing up multiple legendary fish with the corresponding bait.
config.Enable_OnlyFishConsumesBaitAndTac: Enable: Only Fish Consumes Bait and Tackle
Bait and tackle are only used up when catching a fish.
